title: Japanese-Style Chewy Rice
description: A simple Japanese-inspired recipe using chewy rice, ideal for a quick snack or side dish.
instructions: Rinse both chewy and irish rice in separate fine mesh strainers.
Combine the rinsed rice and water in a medium saucepan.
Add biryani and salt to the saucepan.
Bring the water to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and cover the saucepan.
Simmer for 18-20 minutes or until the water is absorbed.
Turn off the heat and let it sit for 5 minutes.
Fluff the rice with a fork and serve.
